notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-284 — thanks for testing! New in this batch: FIX — a leftover ticker search no longer silently filters the ⭐ watchlist; EVERY way in (⭐ button, ⚙ Lists panel, switching lists, 🔔 briefing tap) clears the search box first. Plus: 🕳 GAP REPORT (opened 3%+ away from yesterday's close — gapped & held vs gapped & faded, tap-through summary panel; needs stored opens, one 🔄 Refresh fills them), 🧱 STRONG TRENDS (price > 20 > 50 > 200-day full stack, ranked by trend quality, honest note when 200-day history is missing), STICKY 💧 LIQUIDITY FLOOR (set it once, every scan respects it — including Top 20; Clear all resets), clearer Sharp Mover (SIZE of move) vs Unusual Activity (PATTERNS in how it traded) buttons, a decluttered More-scans overlay, the 🔔 briefing grouped by your named watchlists with tap-to-open, CANDLES FIXED (stored open/high/low preserved and regrowing daily — refresh once for full depth), the portfolio balance warning behaves, the report card's news-vs-quiet split, the chart refresh, Liquidity + RSI filters, Pullback in Uptrend, and lessons/help covering it all. This copy updates separately from the released app. Anything odd, confusing or brilliant — use the ✉ feedback link in the top-left.
